questions.question: Adiabatic evolution requires:

options.text: Slow evolution relative to energy gap

questions.explanation: Evolution must be slow compared to 1/gap^2.

questions.question: The initial Hamiltonian typically has:
questions.explanation: We start with a Hamiltonian whose ground state is easy to prepare.

questions.question: Adiabatic QC and gate model are computationally equivalent.
questions.explanation: They can simulate each other with polynomial overhead.

questions.question: Quantum annealing is:
questions.explanation: Annealing uses adiabatic ideas but may not be strictly adiabatic.
